draft_text: Self-care can play a role in maintaining your mental health and help support your treatment and recovery if you have a mental illness.
rationale: Extracted from remote_caring-for-your-mental-health_6ef87c2f2421.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: How can I take care of my mental health?
rationale: Extracted from remote_caring-for-your-mental-health_6ef87c2f2421.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Self-care means taking the time to do things that help you live well and improve both your physical health and mental health.
rationale: Extracted from remote_caring-for-your-mental-health_6ef87c2f2421.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: This can help you manage stress, lower your risk of illness, and increase your energy.
rationale: Extracted from remote_caring-for-your-mental-health_6ef87c2f2421.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Small amounts of exercise add up, so don’t be discouraged if you can’t do 30 minutes at one time.
rationale: Extracted from remote_caring-for-your-mental-health_6ef87c2f2421.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Pay attention to your intake of caffeine and alcohol and how they affect your mood and well-being—for some, decreasing caffeine and alcohol consumption can be helpful.
rationale: Extracted from remote_caring-for-your-mental-health_6ef87c2f2421.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Try a relaxing activity.
rationale: Extracted from remote_caring-for-your-mental-health_6ef87c2f2421.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Learn to say “no” to new tasks if you start to feel like you’re taking on too much.
rationale: Extracted from remote_caring-for-your-mental-health_6ef87c2f2421.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Try to appreciate what you have accomplished at the end of the day.
rationale: Extracted from remote_caring-for-your-mental-health_6ef87c2f2421.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Identify and challenge your negative and unhelpful thoughts.
rationale: Extracted from remote_caring-for-your-mental-health_6ef87c2f2421.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Reach out to friends or family members who can provide emotional support and practical help.
rationale: Extracted from remote_caring-for-your-mental-health_6ef87c2f2421.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Self-care looks different for everyone, and it is important to find what you need and enjoy.
rationale: Extracted from remote_caring-for-your-mental-health_6ef87c2f2421.html and tagged for variants review.

rationale: Extracted from remote_depression_92cdfa4b91bf.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Explore clinical trials about depression Share outreach materials about depression Find help and support What is depression?
rationale: Extracted from remote_depression_92cdfa4b91bf.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Depression is one of the most common mental disorders in the United States.
rationale: Extracted from remote_depression_92cdfa4b91bf.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: We’re supporting research to develop and test therapies for people with treatment-resistant depression who don’t improve after trying multiple treatment options.
rationale: Extracted from remote_depression_92cdfa4b91bf.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Find help and support Learn how to find help for yourself or someone else.
rationale: Extracted from remote_depression_92cdfa4b91bf.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: You can also find support and locate mental health services in your area on the Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration website.
rationale: Extracted from remote_depression_92cdfa4b91bf.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Tips for Talking With a Health Care Provider About Your Mental Health Download PDF En español Don’t wait for a health care provider to ask about your mental health.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Here are five tips to help prepare and guide you on talking to a health care provider about your mental health and getting the most out of your visit.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: If you don’t know where to start for help, you may want to consider bringing up your mental health concerns during your appointment with a primary care provider (PCP) .
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: In many primary care settings, you may be asked if you’re feeling anxious or depressed, or if you have had thoughts of suicide.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Even if your PCP doesn’t ask you first, take this opportunity to talk to your PCP, who can help refer you to a mental health professional.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: You also can visit the NIMH Find Help for Mental Illnesses webpage for help finding a health care provider or treatment.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Health care providers have a limited time for each appointment, so it may be helpful to think of your questions or concerns beforehand.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: This worksheet may help you prepare your questions or concerns.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: It’s important to tell your health care provider about all the medications you’re taking, including over-the-counter (nonprescription) drugs, herbal remedies, vitamins, and supplements.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: This worksheet can help you track your medications.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Knowing your family mental health history can help determine your risk for certain disorders.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: It can also help your health care provider recommend actions for reducing your risk and enable you and your provider to look for early warning signs.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Consider bringing a friend or relative.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Sometimes it’s helpful to bring a close friend or relative to your appointment.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: A companion can be there for support, help you take notes, and remember what you and the provider discussed.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Your health care provider can help you get better only if you have open and honest communication.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: It is important to remember that discussions between you and a health care provider are private and cannot be shared with anyone without your expressed permission.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: If you have questions or concerns, ask the health care provider for more information about the mental health diagnosis or treatment.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: If a provider suggests a treatment option that you’re not comfortable or familiar with, express your concerns and ask if there are other options.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: You may decide to try a combination of treatment approaches and want to consider getting another opinion from a different health care provider.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: It’s important to remember that there is no “one-size-fits-all” treatment.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: To find one that works best for you, you may need to talk to a few other health care providers to find someone you are comfortable with and try several different treatments or a combination of treatments.
rationale: Extracted from remote_tips-for-talking-with-your-health-care-provider_62242cc0869c.html and tagged for variants review.
